issues.description: SearchDeck is incorrect for this effect. The card requires looking at 3 specific cards from top of deck, revealing up to 1 FILM card, and placing rest at bottom in any order. This is a deck manipulation sequence, not a standard search. Should use a custom action or properly model the 'look at top 3' + 'reveal up to 1' + 'arrange rest' workflow.
Filter uses 'ByName' with 'FILM' - but FILM is a type, not a card name. Should use type-based filtering if supported, or clarify that this searches by card type.
Effect is incomplete: missing the 'place rest at bottom of deck in any order' step. The DSL only captures the 'add 1 FILM to hand' portion and omits the deck arrangement mechanic.
